Setpoints.description: The controller's global climate setpoints (controller spec §4). The controller is crop-agnostic: these are numeric targets, never a crop. Temperature is a day/night pair resolved against the day window each tick.

day_start.description: Start of the day window, local time-of-day HH:MM (24h).

day_end.description: End of the day window, local time-of-day HH:MM (24h). Must be after day_start (enforced by the controller; a violation is rejected with 422).

humidity_low_pct.description: Lower humidity safety bound (%RH). The VPD-derived RH target is clamped to [humidity_low_pct, humidity_high_pct]; this bound also floors the fallback band when the VPD feedforward is unavailable (temperature fault). Must be below humidity_high_pct.

humidity_high_pct.description: Upper humidity safety bound (%RH). Clamps the VPD-derived RH target from above and caps the fallback band. Must be above humidity_low_pct.

humidity_deadband_pct.description: Full hysteresis band width around the VPD-derived RH target (%RH): misters turn on below target − width/2 and off above target + width/2.

co2_target_ppm.description: CO₂ enrichment target; injector opens below this, closes when reached (ppm).

co2_vent_interlock_threshold_pct.description: Vent position above which the CO₂ injector is hard-interlocked off, to avoid enriching while venting (% open).

vpd_target_kpa.description: Primary humidity control input: the vapor-pressure-deficit target (kPa). Each tick the humidity loop derives its RH target by inverting VPD at the fused air temperature, then clamps it to the humidity safety bounds.

dli_target_mol.description: Daily Light Integral target driving supplemental lighting (mol·m⁻²·day⁻¹).

expected_peak_par.description: Operator estimate of clear-sky peak natural PAR at solar noon (µmol·m⁻²·s⁻¹). Predicts how much natural DLI is still coming before day_end so supplemental grow lights cover only the shortfall the sun won't provide. Optional; 0 (the default) disables the prediction, reverting to reactive lighting.

SetpointsPatch.description: Partial update of Setpoints — any subset of the same fields, same bounds. Absent fields are unchanged. Cross-field invariants (humidity_low_pct < humidity_high_pct) are enforced by the controller, not the schema, and surface as 422 on violation.
